pageContext.name: Han Solo & Chewbacca Bishop Chess Piece Pair
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Royal Selangor are proud to present the galaxy's favorite buddies, the Han Solo & Chewbacca Bishop Chess Piece Pair!  Loyalty, trust, the occasional bickering; ample demonstrations of the singular and long-lasting friendship between human and Wookiee. The shared command of the second-fastest ship in the galaxy doesn't hurt either.  Star Wars fans, and those who love a good game of chess, be sure to add Han & Chewie to your collection today!
